name: Coffee-Almond Tortoni
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine whipping cream, 1/4 cup sugar, and flavorings in a medium mixing bowl.
2. Beat at high speed until soft peaks form.
3. Beat egg whites (at room temperature) at high speed of electric mixer just until foamy.
4. Gradually add remaining 1/4 cup sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until soft peaks form.
5. Fold in whipped cream mixture, 2 tablespoons almonds, and 2 tablespoons coconut; spoon half of the mixture into 8 muffin cups lined with foil liners.
6. Stir coffee granules into remaining half of tortoni mixture; spoon over whipped cream mixture in muffin cups.
7. Sprinkle with remaining 2 tablespoons almonds and 2 tablespoons coconut.
8. Cover tightly, and freeze for 8 hours.
Remove frozen tortoni from muffin pans, and place in a zip-top heavy-duty plastic bag. Remove from freezer 15 minutes before serving. Makes 8.
